ogTitle: Sunderland Bay vs Sunset Strip: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Sunderland Bay and Sunset Strip.
heading: Sunderland Bay vs Sunset Strip — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sunderland Bay, Victoria and Sunset Strip, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Sunset Strip has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Sunderland Bay (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Sunderland Bay or Sunset Strip safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sunderland Bay has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Sunset Strip scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sunderland Bay scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Sunset Strip scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sunderland Bay or Sunset Strip?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Sunset Strip has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
